rows.label: tlk47100062_02_msg0001
rows.name:
I vowed to spend my life with Momo.
Momo beat me to confessing, though.

rows.label: tlk47100062_02_msg0002
rows.name:
I suggested holding the ceremony
wherever Momo liked,
and she chose Iyasaki Village.

rows.label: tlk47100062_02_msg0003
rows.name:
For me, it's perfect.
There's nowhere more peaceful.

rows.label: tlk47100062_02_msg0004
rows.name:
How fortunate I am,
now that I can spend
my life with Momo.
